stories.headline: Jimmy Kimmel has proof world leaders ‘hate’ Trump: ‘Saddest photo I’ve ever seen’ - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Jimmy Kimmel is presenting photographic evidence that world leaders 'hate' Trump after his 'increasingly childish behavior' at the G7 Summit.

stories.headline: 'Brothers' First Look: Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson Reunite - Variety
stories.summary: Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson reunite in the first look of their Apple TV comedy show 'Brothers,' which will debut on Sept. 23.

stories.headline: Jamie Lynn Spears details ‘miracle’ moment as daughter Maddie had last rites read post-ATV accident - Page Six
stories.summary: The then-8-year-old “got stuck under” a Polaris after crashing into a pond at her stepfather’s Louisiana home back in February 2017.

stories.headline: Nike SNKRS is Dropping the Air Jordan 3 Retro Knicks via Pre-Order - Sole Retriever
stories.summary: Nike is restocking the Air Jordan 3 Retro Knicks via SNKRS app on June 18. Find details on how to pre-order the pair here.

stories.headline: Jelly Roll Reveals He Needed Treatment at a Hospital Just Days Before Bunnie Xo Divorce Went Public - instyle.com
stories.summary: Jelly Roll revealed he sought treatment at a hospital on June 11, roughly a week before news of his divorce from Bunnie Xo went public. Read more here.

stories.headline: World-renowned Michelin star system coming to Cincinnati | Exclusive - Cincinnati Enquirer
stories.summary: A Michelin star is considered the ultimate honor for restaurants around the world. And now Cincinnati restaurants are eligible to receive one.

stories.headline: Daveigh Chase, star of ‘The Ring’ and the voice of Lilo in Disney’s ‘Lilo & Stitch,’ dies at 35 - NBC News
stories.summary: Former child actor Daveigh Chase, best known for her roles in “Lilo & Stitch” and “The Ring,” has died.

stories.headline: ‘I Will Find You’ Review: Netflix’s Latest Harlan Coben Thriller Is So Bad It’s Almost Good - IndieWire
stories.summary: After being convicted of murdering his son, David (Sam Worthington) gets word his kid is still alive, so he unravels an absurd conspiracy to find him.
